seo.title: Success Stories & Case Studies | BSW TECH
seo.description: Real-world case studies: embedded C/C++, AUTOSAR ECU integration, IoT (LoRaWAN/SIGFOX), and full-stack/mobile apps for European OEMs and industrial clients. Results: 40% downtime reduction, production-ready apps for Volvo/Scania, ISO 26262 programs.
seo.keywords: case studies, success stories, AUTOSAR, embedded C, IoT, LoRaWAN, SIGFOX, React, Kotlin, AWS IoT, ISO 26262

hero.title: Success Stories
hero.subtitle: Real projects delivering real impact for European companies across automotive, IoT, and embedded systems.

stories.title: Enterprise Mobile & Web Applications
stories.scope: Full development of mobile & web applications used by Volvo and Scania for tire-pressure automation systems.
stories.result: Delivered production-ready apps powering tire-pressure automation systems across major automotive manufacturers.

stories.title: LoRaWAN & SIGFOX Pulse Counter
stories.scope: Product developed from scratch — hardware design, firmware development, and IoT connectivity for smart metering.
stories.result: Smart metering solution deployed in real apartments in Chișinău, enabling remote water and energy monitoring.

stories.title: Low-Code Platform Development
stories.scope: Out-staffing of BSW TECH developers to enhance Procesio's workflow automation platform with new features and integrations.
stories.result: Accelerated delivery and cost reduction for core product features, enabling faster time-to-market.

stories.title: Smart Intercom Mobile Application
stories.scope: Full mobile application development for smart intercom system with video streaming and access control.
stories.result: Real-time video communication and remote access control for residential buildings across Eastern Europe.

stories.title: AUTOSAR ECU Integration
stories.scope: AUTOSAR Classic stack integration for body control module with CAN communication and diagnostic protocols.
stories.result: Successfully integrated and validated ECU for series production, meeting ISO 26262 safety requirements.

stories.title: Predictive Maintenance System
stories.scope: Development of IoT sensors and cloud platform for industrial equipment monitoring and predictive maintenance.
stories.result: Reduced equipment downtime by 40% through real-time monitoring and predictive analytics.
